derivation_source: The 55-chapter reader spine generated from the canonical living-book source tree at content commit 3c76d54848d6054b4b99fa20f4dc1f12e996a427, with release metadata committed at 0921a92484cd2a429790f180a4d3ce7bd304446b.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: Quarto/Pandoc reader build followed by scripts/remove_verified_pagination_only_pdf_page.py and complete raster/contact-sheet review
artifact_formats.notes: 13,022,967 bytes; SHA-256 249a7e745fdb302398b532bd03d898b8bc6f07f96fbc6ad3794df69d3d1e1192; 923/923 pages rasterized; PDF is not tagged.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: Pandoc conversion from the visually reviewed reader DOCX plus EPUB package, spine, navigation, and text inspection
artifact_formats.notes: 10,129,904 bytes; SHA-256 c5ea58db02310c966ac0760348cc476ed6fba75446c7527105c0a9c4778a108f; native-reader and assistive-technology review remain unperformed.

artifact_formats.command_or_tool: Pandoc reader build followed by LibreOffice conversion and complete raster/contact-sheet review
artifact_formats.notes: 8,622,060 bytes; SHA-256 3b446abce2722aed960ce0b8d3cbdc7470486df7b9ba3b56f892acdefd8b4ee8; Microsoft Word review remains unperformed.

validation_commands: public redownload byte-count and SHA-256 comparison for PDF, EPUB, and DOCX

review_status.notes: All 55 reader chapters passed the generated-spine contract; PDF and DOCX received complete raster contact-sheet review. No external-human, native-reader, assistive-technology, Microsoft Word, or legal review is claimed.

reader_manuscript.review_notes: The published derivatives bind to the tracked manifest at editions/reader_manuscript/reader_2026_07_18/manifest.json; the generated source directory remains an ignored reproducible build workspace.

human_consumption_gate.notes: Page-complete PDF/DOCX visual review and EPUB structural review passed. EPUB native-application and assistive-technology review remain explicit post-publication compatibility residuals.

audiobook_gate.notes: This transaction publishes no audiobook or embedded-audio EPUB.

release_notes: Published at https://github.com/corbensorenson/asi-stack-book/releases/tag/reader-2026-07-18 and deliberately not marked latest. All three public assets were redownloaded and matched the approved local bytes and SHA-256 digests. The canonical immutable living-book evidence release remains v2.3.0.
residuals: The PDF is untagged and makes no PDF/UA or screen-reader conformance claim.
The EPUB was not reviewed in a native reading application or with assistive technology.
The DOCX was not reviewed in Microsoft Word.
The PDF repair removed one renderer-created pagination-only page; subsequent printed page numbers retain their original values.
non_claims: This reader release does not replace or modify the canonical v2.3.0 living-book evidence release.
Publication does not promote any chapter-core claim or strengthen any empirical conclusion.
No accessibility conformance, independent review, peer review, legal review, or open-license grant is claimed.
